_meta.title: Foundation Build Plan — green-ai
_meta.gate_rule: Feature domains (messaging, Email, Delivery, Lookup) MUST NOT start until SLICE-006 passes all integration tests

security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.fix: Hard HTTP 401 in CurrentUserMiddleware — no fallback, no bypass

security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.description: Users.CurrentProfileId and Users.CurrentCustomerId have no FK constraint, DEFAULT 0
FK_ProfileUserMappings_* and FK_UserInRoles_* defined as NOCHECK — referential integrity not enforced
security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.fix: Enable constraints in rebuild schema from day 1

security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.description: CreateRefreshtoken() bug: inverted condition returns expired token
AuthenticatorSecret (TOTP seed) stored plaintext in DB
security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.fix: Encrypt with IDataProtectionProvider (phase 2 when 2FA is built)

security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.description: SHA256 password hashing — weak against brute force
security_contradictions_to_fix_on_day_1.fix: Detect SHA256 on login → rehash to Argon2id on successful authentication (phase 2)

jwt_contract.language_id_source: User.LanguageId from DB at middleware time — NOT in JWT
jwt_contract.note: Thin JWT. No roles, no capabilities, no test-mode flag baked in. AD_001 decision.

icurrent_user_interface.note: Single interface. HTTP path populated by CurrentUserMiddleware. Batch/job path populated by JobCurrentUser (implements same interface, non-HTTP context). AD_005 decision.

must_build_now.why_now: All gateway credentials, feature flags, and kill-switches read via IApplicationSettingService. No delivery service can initialize without it. DisableAllBroadcasts(184) and DisableAllSystemMessages(206) are system-wide kill-switches that must be readable before any message path is wired.
capabilities: IDbSession + ConnectionFactory (Dapper, SQL Server)
IApplicationSettingService.Get(AppSetting, defaultValue) — full-load cache, key Sms.applicationsettings
IApplicationSettingService.Save(AppSetting, value) — cache invalidation on save
IApplicationSettingService.CreateDefault() — idempotent, run at startup
AppSetting enum — full 50+ key list (EXTRACT FROM sms-service C# enum before starting)
IFileTypeService.FileTypeIdFromExtension(ext) — upload allowlist gate, returns null = reject
AzureBlobStorageConfig — container names as typed constants (not magic strings)
GET /health — returns version, DB connectivity, config cache status
must_build_now.done_when: Health endpoint responds 200 and reads one AppSetting value from DB

must_build_now.why_now: Every HTTP request passes through CurrentUserMiddleware. JWT + DB-backed context. C_001 profileId=0 security bypass must be fixed from day 1. JWT + RefreshToken lifecycle is the session contract for the entire system.
capabilities: ICurrentUser interface: {UserId, CustomerId, ProfileId, LanguageId, ImpersonateFromUserId, IsAuthenticated, IsImpersonating}
CurrentUserMiddleware: JWT validate → DB load User → load Customer + Profile → ICurrentUser → DI. Hard HTTP 401 on profileId=0 or customerId=0
LoginHandler: email+password → SHA256 validate → lockout check (IsLockedOut OR FailedLoginCount>5 → 403) → profile auto-assign (exactly 1 → assign, 0 or >1 → HTTP 300) → JWT issuance
RefreshTokenHandler: validate DB token → read User.CurrentCustomerId + User.CurrentProfileId → reissue JWT → update sliding TTL
LogoutHandler: DELETE UserRefreshTokens for user. JWT valid for up to 15min after (known debt, not fixed in phase 1)
SelectCustomerHandler: CanUserAccessCustomer() → UPDATE Users.CurrentCustomerId → reissue JWT
SelectProfileHandler: CanUserAccessProfile() → UPDATE Users.CurrentProfileId → reissue JWT
IPermissionService: DoesUserHaveRole(userId, role), DoesProfileHaveRole(profileId, role), CanUserAccessCustomer(userId, customerId), CanUserAccessProfile(profileId, userId) — Dapper + in-memory cache
PasswordResetHandler: send reset email → set new password. Min 8 chars, must contain: digit + lowercase + uppercase + special ($*-+?_&=!%/{}()#)
POST /api/auth/login
GET /api/auth/refresh
POST /api/auth/logout
POST /api/auth/select-customer
POST /api/auth/select-profile
POST /api/auth/password-reset-request
POST /api/auth/password-reset-confirm
GET /api/auth/me (returns resolved ICurrentUser fields)
not_in_this_slice: Argon2id migration (C_010) — phase 2, detect-on-login pattern added after LoginHandler is stable
must_build_now.done_when: Login returns 200 with accessToken. profileId=0 → hard 401. Expired token + valid refresh → new token. Logout deletes refresh token. SELECT profile propagates into next JWT.

must_build_now.why_now: Every data query requires WHERE CustomerId = @currentUser.CustomerId. Customer is the outer partition key — the data model is invalid without it. Must exist before any profile, message, or address entity is created.
capabilities: Customer entity (Id, Name, CountryId, LanguageId, ScimTokenUUID)
ICustomerService.GetById(customerId)
ICustomerService.GetCustomersForUser(userId)
ICustomerService.Create(customer)
ICustomerService.Update(customer)
CustomerUserMapping management: AddUserToCustomer, RemoveUserFromCustomer
CanUserAccessCustomer(userId, customerId) — gates all customer-scoped data access
must_build_now.done_when: User can be member of multiple customers. CanUserAccessCustomer returns false for non-member. CurrentUserMiddleware resolves Customer from User.CurrentCustomerId.

must_build_now.why_now: Profile = decisive runtime scope. DoesProfileHaveRole() is called in every feature service. Without it, no capability gate can function. Must be live before any feature domain slice starts.
capabilities: Profile entity (Id, CustomerId, ProfileTypeId, Name, Deleted, DateDeletedUtc)
IProfileService.GetById(profileId)
IProfileService.GetProfilesForUser(userId, customerId)
IProfileService.CanUserAccessProfile(profileId, userId)
IProfileService.Insert(profile)
IProfileService.Update(profile)
IProfileService.SoftDelete(profileId) — sets Deleted=true + DateDeletedUtc
ProfileUserMapping management: AddUserAccess, RemoveUserAccess
ProfileRoleMapping management: AddRoles(profileId, roleIds), RemoveRoles(profileId, roleIds)
DoesProfileHaveRole(profileId, ProfileRoleNames.*) — the global feature gate
ProfileRoleGroup as creation-time template only (changing group does NOT update existing profiles)
ProfileType enum seeded: Water, WasteWater, Electricity, Heating, Renovation, Standard
must_build_now.done_when: DoesProfileHaveRole returns correct true/false. ProfileUserMapping correctly isolates profile access. Customer membership does NOT auto-grant profile access.

must_build_now.why_now: UI labels are broken without translations. ActivityLogEntries store translation keys — not resolved strings — so ILocalizationService must resolve them at display time. User.LanguageId from ICurrentUser drives the active locale.
capabilities: ILocalizationService.GetString(key, languageId) — returns label or key-as-fallback if missing
ILocalizationService.GetAllForLanguage(languageId) — returns full dictionary for client-side use
LocaleStringResources table (Id, ResourceKey, Value, LanguageId)
Languages table seeded (at minimum: DK, NO, FI, SE, EN)
GET /api/localization/{languageId} — returns full label dictionary
must_build_now.ssot_extraction_needed: Export minimum label set (~200 keys: login, navigation, common errors) from sms-service LocaleStringResources as seed data
must_build_now.done_when: API returns correct label for key in DK + NO. Unknown key returns key name as fallback (never null).

must_build_now.why_now: ISystemLogger must be injectable from the first line of application code. All audit stamps (UserId, CustomerId) on log entries require ICurrentUser — so logging is wired in immediately after identity_access is live.
capabilities: ISystemLogger: Log(LogLevel, message, userId?, customerId?)
LogLevel enum: Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Fatal
DefaultLogger: writes to Logs table via Dapper
ApplicationInsightsLogger: forwards to Azure Monitor (Application Insights connection string via AppSetting)
FinalEmailLogger: sends email on Fatal level (system email, not SendGrid path)
OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler: DelegatingHandler — auto-inject into all HttpClient instances via DI
RequestResponseLoggingMiddleware: HTTP request/response logging, gated by AppSetting.RequestLogLevel(160) — values: off / Error / All
BlobErrorLogger: writes critical infra failures to Azure Blob 'errorlogs' container (3 trigger types: Dapper DB connection fail, Dapper license invalid, SendGrid email error)
not_in_this_slice: ImpersonationLogs (added when impersonation is implemented in phase 2)
must_build_now.done_when: Every authenticated request produces a log row with UserId+CustomerId. Fatal log produces email. Outbound HTTP calls are logged automatically.

should_build_later.why_later: Audit trail is important but not blocking any user-facing feature. Drop in once the first feature domain (messaging) starts writing events.
capabilities: IActivityLogService.CreateLog(type, objectId)
IActivityLogService.AddEntry(logId, translationKey, parameters)
ActivityLogType enum: Broadcast, SubscriptionsImport, PositiveListsImport, StandardReceiversImport
Translation key storage pattern (key stored — resolved at read time via ILocalizationService)

should_build_later.why_later: Core login works in phase 1. These are customer-specific auth methods — most portal users will not need them in the first sprint.
capabilities: 2FA TOTP: AuthenticatorSecret encrypted via IDataProtectionProvider (fixes C_009)
2FA SMS pin: ISmsSender + pin generation + UserPinCode storage
2FA Email pin: IEmailService + pin generation
Argon2id migration: detect SHA256 hash pattern on login → rehash to Argon2id on success (fixes C_010)
Impersonation: SuperAdmin only, CustomerId in {1, 9}. ImpersonateFromUserId in JWT.
SAML2 SSO: CustomerSamlSettings (EntityId, MetadataUrl, EmailClaim), SustainSys.Saml2 library, /sso/{customerId} route
Azure AD / Entra ID: MSAL token exchange, admin consent flow
SCIM provisioning: Customer.ScimTokenUUID bearer token auth, inbound user sync

should_build_later.why_later: Background services and batch execution needed for delivery and large imports, but not for portal shell or first feature slices using synchronous paths.
capabilities: IHostedService: SmsBackgroundService (time-sensitive SMS → GatewayAPI, per-server queue)
IHostedService: VoiceBackgroundService (→ Infobip, per-server queue)
IHostedService: EmailBackgroundService (SmsLog → EmailMessage conversion + queue)
IHostedService: SendGridBackgroundService (EmailMessage → SendGrid API). Split from EmailBackgroundService so system emails (password reset, notifications) can be sent without SmsLogId.
IHostedService: ClientEventBackgroundService (polls ClientEvents table → SSE push via Lib.AspNetCore.ServerSentEvents)
Azure Batch: IJobService, Jobs/JobTasks/JobTaskStatuses tables, ServiceAlertBatchAction enum (54+ values), QuartzNET cron scheduler
JobCurrentUser: implements ICurrentUser with ProfileId/CustomerId from job metadata (non-HTTP context, AD_005)
SSE: ClientEvents(Id, Key, DateCreatedUtc, Payload) table + IClientEventService + Lib.AspNetCore.ServerSentEvents NuGet
should_build_later.design_rationale: Background services exist because Azure Batch startup latency was too slow for pin codes and time-sensitive single sends. Do NOT route pin code SMS through Azure Batch.

should_build_later.why_later: Extended customer config only needed when those feature domains are built.
capabilities: CustomerSamlSettings (when SAML2 SSO is built)
CustomerSubscriptionSettings (when subscription billing is built)
Admin UI: create/edit customer, manage user-to-customer access
UserRoleGroup management (policy-level role grouping for customers)

should_build_later.why_later: Extended profile features needed when file storage and API keys are built.
capabilities: ProfileStorageFiles + Azure Blob upload to 'profilestorage' container (when file upload feature is built)
ProfileApiKeys management (when public API is built)
ProfileLogos (when branded notifications are built)

do_not_build_yet.reason: Blocked by identity_access steps 1-8 + profile_management + job_management all stable
Lookup pipeline complex (NO/DK/FI/SE) — requires separate discovery + planning pass
Requires messaging + Email + Voice + job_management all stable first
Country-specific complexity — separate planning pass required
Domain discovery score too low — verify before planning
Infobip integration — plan separately after messaging is stable
Not a portal capability — external system integration (e-conomic)
Circular write dependency on identity_access — must come after SLICE-006
Norway-specific. Build after SAML2 SSO is stable. CanSendByLocationAlert ProfileRole is additive — add the enum value early, implement the flow in phase 3.
Active sprint in sms-service (#12077-12114) — let that stabilize before porting the domain model to green-ai

golden_sample_scope.description: Minimum viable portal proving all 6 phase-1 foundation domains work together. A developer can log in, see their profile, read a label, and get a config value. Every other feature domain is proven against this running baseline.
capabilities: User can log in with email+password and receive accessToken + refreshToken
Expired access token is silently renewed via refresh token (480min sliding TTL)
User is auto-assigned to their only profile (or shown profile selector if multiple)
All UI labels served in user's language via ILocalizationService (fallback = key name)
All gateway credentials readable from IApplicationSettingService (cached, invalidated on Save)
DoesProfileHaveRole() returns correct true/false for every capability flag
Every request produces a log row with UserId + CustomerId stamp
profileId=0 or customerId=0 returns hard HTTP 401 (C_001 + C_005 fixed)

slices.goal: Running API shell with DB session, config load, and health endpoint
artifacts: AppSetting enum (extracted from sms-service — see ssot_extractions)
GET /health — version + DB connectivity + config cache status
ssot_required: AppSetting enum full list extracted from sms-service C# enum file
Azure Blob container names as typed constants
slices.done_when: Health endpoint responds 200 and reads one AppSetting value from DB

slices.goal: User can log in and receive a valid JWT + refresh token
artifacts: RefreshTokenHandler: validate DB token → reissue JWT
CurrentUserMiddleware: JWT → ICurrentUser → DI (hard 401 on profileId=0)
slices.done_when: Login returns 200 with accessToken. profileId=0 → hard 401. Expired token + valid refresh → new token. Logout deletes refresh token.

slices.goal: Customer and Profile context resolves correctly on every request
artifacts: IPermissionService: CanUserAccessCustomer, CanUserAccessProfile, DoesUserHaveRole, DoesProfileHaveRole (Dapper + in-memory cache)
Profile auto-assign on login (exactly 1 profile → auto-select, otherwise HTTP 300)
ssot_required: ProfileRole enum full list — extract 63 values from sms-service
UserRole enum — extract 40 values from sms-service
slices.done_when: DoesProfileHaveRole returns correct value. ProfileId=0 returns HTTP 401. Customer membership does NOT auto-grant profile access. Profile switch propagates into next JWT.

slices.goal: Labels serve correctly in user's language
artifacts: LocaleStringResources table + Languages table + seed data
ssot_required: Language IDs from sms-service (DK, NO, FI, SE, EN at minimum)
Seed: ~200 minimum label keys (login, navigation, common errors) — export from sms-service LocaleStringResources
slices.done_when: API returns correct label for key in DK + NO. Unknown key returns key name as fallback (never null, never exception).

slices.goal: All requests have structured log entries with user context
artifacts: OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler (auto-injected into all HttpClient via DI)
ssot_required: AppSetting.RequestLogLevel(160) — gate values: off / Error / All
slices.done_when: Every authenticated request produces a log row with UserId+CustomerId. OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler auto-intercepts all HttpClient calls. Fatal log triggers email.

slices.goal: Golden sample — all 6 foundation domains working end-to-end
artifacts: Integration test suite: login → select profile → read label → check capability → verify log entry
Admin seed script: 1 customer, 1 profile, 1 user, minimum roles, minimum labels
Foundation health check endpoint: reports per-domain readiness status
ssot_required: docs/IDENTITY_ACCESS_CORE_FOUNDATION.md Section 7 (Recommended Build Order — gate after step 8)
slices.done_when: Developer can: log in → auto-receive profile → call API gated by DoesProfileHaveRole → see Danish label → verify log entry. Security contradictions C_001 + C_005 provably fixed in integration tests. Feature domains may begin after this slice passes.
slices.gate: HARD GATE — no feature domain work starts until this slice passes all integration tests

ssot_extractions_required_before_slice_0.item: AppSetting enum — full 50+ key list with numeric IDs
ProfileRoleNames enum — all 63+ values with IDs

ssot_extractions_required_before_slice_0.source_file_pattern: sms-service DB export or resource files
